lowest20.message: The meltdown was huge and I feel shaken.
lowest20.response:
That sounds exhausting.

What may be happening right now is that everyone is running on low capacity, so even small demands can feel much bigger.

Those moments can leave you completely drained.

Parenting a neurodivergent child asks a lot of you. Feeling stretched doesn't mean you're doing it wrong.
